task_description: Review docs/plans/blog-rebuild-plan.md for gaps, suggestions, and missing recommendations before implementation.
initial_idea: Review docs/plans/blog-rebuild-plan.md and identify additional suggestions/supplements for the new Astro blog rebuild project.

rounds.question: 你这次希望我给的建议，主要收敛在“尽快上线的 V1 必需项”，还是也把“长期内容治理 / 同步可维护性”一起作为高优先级来审？
rounds.notes: User wants both V1 launch quality and long-term maintainability reviewed together.

rounds.question: 如果 AI 生成结果不理想，你是否接受 V1 就加入一个很轻量的兜底规则：frontmatter 里如果手动写了 slug / description / tags，就优先手动值；没写才走 AI 自动生成？
rounds.notes: User accepts manual frontmatter overrides as fallback over AI-generated metadata.

preliminary_findings: Main likely gaps are metadata governance, sync observability, redirect strategy completeness, and deployment/config operational details.

summary: Review concluded with explicit V1 non-goals and acceptance of manual frontmatter overrides for AI metadata. Main plan supplements are metadata governance, sync observability/idempotency, URL stability strategy, SEO detail completion, and stronger acceptance checklist.
